## PR Type
- [ ] New prompt / skill / template
- [ ] Update / improvement to existing asset
- [ ] Bug fix (broken model compatibility)
- [ ] Fork of existing asset with modifications
- [ ] Documentation / guide
- [ ] Deprecation request

---

## Summary
<!-- Describe what this PR adds or changes and why -->

---

## Asset Details
| Field      | Value                             |
|---|---|
| Title      |                                   |
| Type       | prompt / skill / template         |
| Category   | e.g. coding, reasoning            |
| Version    | e.g. 1.0.0                        |
| Status     | draft / experimental / stable     |
| File path  | e.g. prompts/coding/my-prompt.md  |

---

## Model Compatibility Testing
<!-- Test on at least one model before submitting -->
| Model | Result (works/partial/broken) | Notes |
|---|---|---|
|   |   |   |
|   |   |   |

---

## Fork Attribution
- [ ] This is NOT a fork — original submission
- [ ] This IS a fork of: `[link to original file]`
  - **Changes made from original:**

---

## Checklist
- [ ] YAML front matter present and complete
- [ ] `version` follows `X.Y.Z` format
- [ ] At least one `tested_on_models` entry with result and notes
- [ ] `description` is 2–4 sentences
- [ ] `example_input` and `example_output` provided
- [ ] `changelog` entry added matching the current version
- [ ] File is in the correct folder
- [ ] If forking: `forked_from` and `fork_changes` fields are set
- [ ] I have read `CONTRIBUTING.md`
- [ ] I agree to `CODE_OF_CONDUCT.md`
- [ ] License is set to `CC-BY-4.0`

---

## Additional Context
<!-- Edge cases, token budget notes, known limitations, model quirks -->
